message:
test(proptest): check in regression seeds for ARS and latency stage tests

Proptest regression files capture seeds for previously-discovered failure
cases so they are automatically re-tested before generating novel cases.
Per proptest documentation: "It is recommended to check this file in to
source control so that everyone who runs the test benefits from these
saved cases."

Three regression files:
- proptest_ars_evidence: seed for ChangeDetection edge case with short
  numeric key and Support variant
- proptest_ars_timeout: seed for n_recorded=1, n_timeouts=2 boundary case
- proptest_latency_stages: four seeds covering PtyCapture stage overflow,
  skip index boundary, and cost/sequence/deadline edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc af048988f62f682f15b85c1fe192e54fad5bfc6deb8cf0e489536d75df3a1889 # shrinks to entries = [(ChangeDetection, 1, "0AaA ", {"aa": Number(242.88605265753458)}, Support)]

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 404ea2153f70b7ab86ed4f12d25343ddb35669255c94abb612fa6232dbb36117 # shrinks to n_recorded = 1, n_timeouts = 2

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc ad601f2525bb7afe42468e40e60995a9f39fb26458f90a3d6b028d5e3bed87ed # shrinks to skip_idx = 7
+cc f2add2f1e1b75ac04a7b17acafd169a4baf99f6eae4048c3ab3b5d57fff542f2 # shrinks to values = [3.5635120889253247, 2.058380577213781, 7.852177181272323, 9.210714312488726]
+cc 7b95d6dbd6e014cfa667770405ad10bd3e22a87cda9865b2da6ba4ad238c029b # shrinks to stage = PtyCapture, latency = 98073.78600020817, overflow = false, level_idx = 0
+cc bae32fbcbb383f959d16a71f82094e33f28d920c2bd12ac3fc271d9104ea0360 # shrinks to stage_idx = 0, cost = 981594.3828958337, seq = 1, arrived = 0, deadline = 0
